supply_chain.dependencies: Region-of-use production strategy with corresponding region-of-use supplier partners. Much of U.S. based residential portfolio is manufactured in the Baja region of Mexico under the IMMEX program.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions including product manufacturing and logistical services, material shortages, electronic component shortages, labor shortages, capacity constraints, freight delays, new or increased tariffs and trade restrictions

regulatory_risks: New or increased tariffs, changes to trade agreements, sanctions, import and export regulations
Custom duties and applicable tax regulations and interpretations
Changes in laws and regulations or imposition of currency restrictions
Fire and building codes and EHS (Environmental, Health and Safety) standards
Climate change legislation or other environmental mandates
Data privacy laws and regulations including European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
Cybersecurity reporting requirements and disclosure obligations
Global Minimum Tax (GMT) rate of 15% implementation
Transfer pricing regulations in countries of operation
State Aid investigations by European Commission

sanction_risks: Retaliatory actions from tariffs or trade restrictions
Conflicts in Middle East and war between Russia and Ukraine
Sovereign debt crises and currency instability
